ingredients.item:
CABBAGE SLAW
14 ounces (400 g) white or purple cabbage, shredded
7 ounces (200 g) carrots, shredded
ingredients.original:
CABBAGE SLAW
14 ounces (400 g) white or purple cabbage, shredded
7 ounces (200 g) carrots, shredded

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item:
DRESSING
½ cup (120 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
½ cup (120 ml) tahini
ingredients.original:
DRESSING
½ cup (120 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
½ cup (120 ml) tahini

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice (about 2 lemons), plus more if needed
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice (about 2 lemons), plus more if needed

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (13 g) roughly chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (13 g) roughly chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE CABBAGE SLAW: In a medium salad bowl, combine the cabbage and carrots. Add the green onion, parsley, and raisins. Sprinkle with the ½ teaspoon salt.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE CABBAGE SLAW: In a medium salad bowl, combine the cabbage and carrots. Add the green onion, parsley, and raisins. Sprinkle with the ½ teaspoon salt.

ingredients.item: 2 TO MAKE THE DRESSING: Place the yogurt, tahini, lemon juice, honey, salt, pepper, garlic, green onion, and parsley in a small blender and process until smooth. You may need to add a few tablespoons of water to loosen the dressing to help it blend well. Taste and adjust for more salt and/or lemon juice if needed.
ingredients.original: 2 TO MAKE THE DRESSING: Place the yogurt, tahini, lemon juice, honey, salt, pepper, garlic, green onion, and parsley in a small blender and process until smooth. You may need to add a few tablespoons of water to loosen the dressing to help it blend well. Taste and adjust for more salt and/or lemon juice if needed.

ingredients.item: 3 Drizzle the dressing over the salad. Toss to combine well and serve.
ingredients.original: 3 Drizzle the dressing over the salad. Toss to combine well and serve.
